RBLX.title: Roblox Stock Rises After The Close: Here's Why

macro_events.event_summary: CNBC piece discussing market expectations for when the Fed might resume rate hikes — speculative/forward-looking, not an actual policy action.
primary_drivers: speculation about higher-for-longer or renewed hiking cycle
potential repricing of rate-sensitive duration assets
headlines: Fed to hike? When traders see a rate increase coming
